title: Debug AE table: sorting and percentage denominator errors

inputs.prompt: The following R program generates Table 14-4.02 but has 3 bugs: (1) Percentage denominator uses total Safety population N=254 for all treatment groups instead of the treatment-specific N, causing incorrect percentages, (2) The 5% incidence threshold filters based on SOC-level percentage instead of PT-level, removing entire SOCs incorrectly, (3) TRTEMFL filter is missing, so pre-treatment AEs are included in the counts. Fix all bugs.
